listening.title: Listening: Uncertain plans
listening.transcript: It might rain later, so take an umbrella. She could be at home now. We might not finish the project on time.

questions.question: What does the speaker suggest taking?

listening.title: Listening: Hopes and decisions
listening.transcript: I want to learn a new language this year. She decided to apply for the job. We hope to see you again soon.

questions.question: What did she decide to do?
questions.explanation: "She decided to apply for the job."
